Call ID: EXT-033
Type: external
Date: 2026-05-04
Topic: Adoption & Onboarding
Participants: Raj (account manager); Marcus (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Raj): Hi Marcus, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Marcus): Honestly, adoption has been slower than we hoped internally.
AM (Raj): I can run a tailored enablement session for your team.
Customer (Marcus): Numbers matter to us — show me the impact.
AM (Raj): We have an onboarding track that could help your new hires ramp faster.
Customer (Marcus): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Raj): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
